hidden_state.scenario_summary: A short GPU node failure caused customer-visible job failures, but the incident stayed below contract thresholds and does not warrant a credit or goodwill path.
latent_facts: The incident is real and customer-visible.
The duration and policy path do not support a credit.
The account context does not make goodwill review necessary.
likely_failure_modes: The model sees customer-visible failures and incorrectly awards a credit.
The model escalates to goodwill review even though there is no commercial sensitivity signal.

case_packet.title: Short GPU node failure does not trigger credit

notes: Standard enterprise terms without special goodwill commitments.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: A single GPU node failure caused several jobs to fail, but the incident resolved within 11 minutes.
anomalies: Jobs pinned to one GPU pool failed and were rescheduled after node replacement.

incident_record.customer_impact_summary: A subset of jobs failed during an 11-minute node incident.
incident_record.engineering_summary: A GPU node failure in one pool caused temporary job failures until workloads were rescheduled.

case_packet.customer_note: Several jobs failed during a brief platform incident. Please confirm whether anything applies commercially.
case_packet.policy_snippet: Covered service credits apply only when customer-visible outages or covered delays exceed 30 minutes, or when monthly uptime thresholds are breached.
case_packet.calculator_output: Incident duration: 11 minutes. No automatic credit threshold met.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Real customer-visible incident with job failures, but no credit is due under standard thresholds.

adjudication_notes: The incident is cleanly attributable, but commercial relief is not triggered because duration stayed below threshold and no special account context is present.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We confirmed a brief platform incident caused the job failures, but the event stayed below the contract’s service-credit threshold, so no credit is due. We can share the incident summary and remediation details.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: engineering_owner. Action: send_explanation_only because root cause is gpu_node_failure, customer impact is job_failure, and contractual outcome is no_credit_due.
